subtitle.ja: 人差し指の構えから始めます。両手の親指で小指の手前の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: Begin with the Index Finger Base. With both thumbs, pick up the near little-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 両手の人差し指を、人差し指の前にある三角の輪に上から差し入れます
subtitle.en: Insert both index fingers from above into the triangular loops in front of the index fingers.

subtitle.ja: 両手小指の糸を外します
手を左右に広げ、両手人差し指の背にかかっている糸を落とします
subtitle.en: Move the hands apart and release the strings resting on the backs of both index fingers.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指の輪に中指を下から入れ、糸を移します
subtitle.en: Insert both middle fingers from below into the index loops and transfer the strings to them.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指にかかっている上の糸は残したまま、親指同士を繋いでいる下の糸だけを外します
subtitle.en: Keep the upper strings on both thumbs, and release only the lower string that runs between the thumbs.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指の前にある三角の輪に親指を上から入れ、親指の腹で糸を取って完成です
subtitle.en: Insert both thumbs from above into the triangular loops in front of the thumbs, catch the strings with the pads of the thumbs, and this completes the figure.
